comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Verified in current checkout as a structured-concurrency / ownership issue. extensions/tau/src/autoresearch/index.ts still keeps long-lived loop workflow state in module-local Maps (activeAutoresearchLoops at line 889, waitingAutoresearchAgentEnds at 890) and starts the main loop via detached fire-and-forget async code in runAutoresearchLoop(): void (lines 1474-1573), specifically void (async () => { ... })() at line 1483. Cancellation is manual through ActiveAutoresearchLoopControl { cancelled, cancelWait } plus AbortController wiring for the current wait (1515-1523), and final cleanup removes the map entry in finally (1569-1571). That is better than a raw leak, but the workflow itself is still outside Effect-scoped fiber ownership. So the review claim is directionally valid: waiter cleanup improved, while the loop runner remains detached async state managed by Maps rather than a scoped Effect service.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Moved autoresearch loop execution into a scoped Effect service and removed detached fire-and-forget async loop state from `autoresearch/index.ts`. Added new service `extensions/tau/src/services/autoresearch-loop-runner.ts` (`AutoresearchLoopRunnerLive`) that owns active loop fibers and agent-end waiters inside a managed scope (`Scope.make` + `forkIn` + finalizer), with API: `ensureLoopRunning`, `cancelLoop`, `waitForAgentEnd`, `resolveAgentEnd`. Refactored `extensions/tau/src/autoresearch/index.ts` to use the service for loop lifecycle and waiter resolution: `runAutoresearchLoop` now registers an Effect program through `runner.ensureLoopRunning(...)` instead of `void (async () => ...)` and module-local control maps, and `agent_end` / `session_shutdown` now signal waiters via `runner.resolveAgentEnd(...)`. Integrated service into runtime wiring (`extensions/tau/src/app.ts`) and autoresearch test harness environments. Added focused tests `extensions/tau/test/autoresearch-loop-runner.test.ts` (dedupe per loop key, cancellation interrupts, waiter resolution) and updated adapter/runtime tests to include the new service layer. Validation: `npm run gate` passed.
